originalTitle: PufferLib - Reinforcement Learning Agents Including Me
title: Profiling and Optimizing GPU Utilization for Small Networks in PufferLib
summary: Worked on profiling PufferLib's hardware efficiency by measuring model FLOPs utilization (MFU) and exploring torch compile and JAX comparisons to optimize performance for small batch sizes and networks. Identified potential for significant speed improvements through better compilation and lower-precision modes.
